Title: Login with valid credentials - should navigate to Home page
Description: Verify that a user with valid credentials can log in and be redirected to the Home page successfully.
Preconditions:
1. Browser is open
2. User is on Login page
3. Valid account exists: email=test@hrcloud.com / password=Test@1234
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Login page
2. Enter valid email address into the Email field
3. Enter valid password into the Password field
4. Click the Login button
5. Verify the Home page is displayed
Expected Results: Home page loads successfully with the user's name shown in the header

Title: Login with invalid password - should show error message
Description: Verify that logging in with a wrong password displays an appropriate error and does not grant access.
Preconditions:
1. Browser is open
2. User is on Login page
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Login page
2. Enter valid email address into the Email field
3. Enter an incorrect password into the Password field
4. Click the Login button
5. Verify the error message is displayed
Expected Results: An error message appears stating invalid credentials and the user remains on the Login page

Title: Login with empty fields - should disable or block Login button
Description: Verify that submitting the login form with empty fields is prevented.
Preconditions:
1. Browser is open
2. User is on Login page
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Login page
2. Leave Email and Password fields empty
3. Click the Login button (or attempt to submit)
Expected Results: Login button is disabled or a validation message is shown requiring both fields to be filled
